description: 30-ticket triage validation suite (subset of Set D)

cases.title: VPN Split Tunnel Not Routing
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect connects but internal subnets 10.20.0.0/16 are unreachable. Split tunnel policy may be misapplied on the VPN gateway.

cases.title: Corporate DNS MX Record Failure
cases.description: Inbound email bouncing — external DNS MX records for mail.corp.local not resolving. nslookup fails from office network.

cases.title: Firewall Blocking HTTPS Egress
cases.description: Outbound HTTPS on port 443 to api.partner.com blocked by perimeter firewall. Need allow rule for integration.

cases.title: Guest Wi-Fi Captive Portal Loop
cases.description: Guest Wi-Fi connects but captive portal page reloads endlessly. Users cannot complete network authentication.

cases.title: Load Balancer Pool Unhealthy
cases.description: F5 load balancer marks all nodes in checkout-pool unhealthy. Users see 502 bad gateway at the edge.

cases.title: Zscaler PAC File Misconfiguration
cases.description: Zscaler PAC file sending traffic to wrong proxy port. Internal Jenkins agents cannot reach artifact repo.

cases.title: MPLS Circuit Packet Loss
cases.description: MPLS WAN link between HQ and DR site showing 8% packet loss. Latency spikes on VoIP and replication traffic.

cases.title: SSL VPN Certificate Trust Error
cases.description: VPN client shows untrusted server certificate when connecting remotely. Corporate root CA may have expired on gateway.

cases.title: Docking Station Display Not Detected
cases.description: Thunderbolt dock powers laptop but external Dell monitor shows no signal. USB-C display path not enumerating.

cases.title: Laptop Keyboard Keys Unresponsive
cases.description: Several keys on company MacBook Pro keyboard stopped registering input. Physical keyboard hardware failure suspected.

cases.title: Server Rack PDU Tripped
cases.description: PDU in rack A3 tripped breaker. Three production servers powered off unexpectedly in datacenter row 4.

cases.title: Secure Boot Blocking Driver
cases.description: Windows laptop blocks new Wi-Fi driver install — Secure Boot policy prevents unsigned driver load after firmware update.

cases.title: Hyper-V Host CPU Thermal Alert
cases.description: Hyper-V host HV-PROD-03 reporting CPU thermal throttling. Virtual machines experiencing performance degradation.

cases.title: Fleet Printer Toner Critical
cases.description: Floor 5 HP printer fleet reports critical toner on 6 devices. Print queue backing up for finance department.

cases.title: Laptop SMART Disk Failure Warning
cases.description: Dell laptop BIOS reports SMART disk failure imminent. User cannot boot reliably — hardware replacement needed.

cases.title: UPS Battery Replacement Overdue
cases.description: UPS in server room B reporting end-of-life battery. Runtime under 3 minutes on simulated power fail test.

cases.title: Outlook Calendar Not Syncing
cases.description: Microsoft Outlook desktop client stopped syncing calendar events. Web Outlook works but desktop shows stale meetings.

cases.title: Chrome Extension Crash Loop
cases.description: Internal Chrome extension causes browser crash on launch. Desktop client unusable for procurement portal.

cases.title: Jira Workflow Transition Error
cases.description: Jira ticket workflow transition fails with script error when moving from In Review to Done. Application workflow bug.

cases.title: Slack Desktop Notifications Silent
cases.description: Slack desktop app not showing notifications on Windows 11. Messages arrive but no toast or badge updates.

cases.title: Java Runtime Missing for ERP Client
cases.description: Internal ERP desktop client fails to launch — Java Runtime Environment not found after workstation image refresh.

cases.title: Mobile Push Notifications Failed
cases.description: Corporate mobile app push notifications stopped on iOS devices after certificate rotation. Application backend integration issue.

cases.title: Power BI Dataset Refresh Error
cases.description: Power BI scheduled dataset refresh fails with gateway timeout. Report shows stale data in executive dashboard.

cases.title: IDE Build Toolchain Failure
cases.description: Visual Studio build fails with MSB4018 task error after NuGet package update. Local development toolchain broken.

cases.title: Suspicious Login from Foreign IP
cases.description: Security incident: multiple failed and one successful login for finance user from IP in unfamiliar country. Suspected account compromise.

cases.title: USB Malware Scan Positive
cases.description: Endpoint protection flagged malware on USB drive inserted into workstation WS-HR-19. Quarantine and forensics required.

cases.title: Spear Phishing Targeting Executive
cases.description: CFO received targeted phishing email with malicious attachment disguised as board report. Security incident — do not open.

cases.title: DLP Credit Card Data Export Alert
cases.description: Data loss prevention alert: user attempted to email file containing credit card numbers to external address.

cases.title: Compromised Service Account Detected
cases.description: Security incident: service account SVC-BILLING shows impossible travel logins. Credential compromise suspected — rotate immediately.

cases.title: SQL Injection in Web Access Logs
cases.description: WAF detected SQL injection attempts against customer portal. Active attack pattern in Apache access logs — investigate source IPs.
